metadata.relation_to_case: Wife of Arjun Mehta, Director of Sahara Ventures

content: I am Priya Mehta. I am not a businesswoman. I have never owned or operated Sahara Ventures. I was in Delhi from November 10–15, 2022, attending my sister’s wedding. I did not file any documents with MCA. My Aadhaar was stolen in 2021 — I reported it to the police then. The signature on the Sahara Ventures registration is not mine. I never received any money from Sahara Ventures. The ₹3.2 crore transferred to my account in July 2023 was a gift from my father — he is a retired army officer. I have no idea how the company was registered in my name. I am a victim of identity theft. I cooperate fully with the investigation.
